commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Strongest. Chaldean, "mighty in strength "(Haydock) his own guards, the usual executioners.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: Just as if the usual fire without multiplied intensity could not have consumed the youths' bodies! But a fury and rage which borders on madness can observe no bounds. Also he wished by the threat of intensified punishment to terrify those who seemed prepared for death.
